## Choose a PR template

Select the template that best matches your change:

- Feature: https://github.com/DarlanPrado/nuxt-zod/compare/main...HEAD?quick_pull=1&template=feature.md
- Bug fix: https://github.com/DarlanPrado/nuxt-zod/compare/main...HEAD?quick_pull=1&template=bug.md
- Docs: https://github.com/DarlanPrado/nuxt-zod/compare/main...HEAD?quick_pull=1&template=docs.md

If you continue with this default template, replace the sections below.

## Linked issue or discussion
<!-- Example: Resolves #123 -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation

## Summary
<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Validation
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint` (or marked not applicable)
- [ ] I ran `npm run test` (or marked not applicable)
- [ ] I ran `npm run test:types` when TypeScript types or public API changed

## Docs
- [ ] I updated documentation/examples when needed
- [ ] No documentation update is needed
